word: G4896 - σύνειμι - sýneimi - soon'-i-mee - Gather together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: σύνειμ

- Transliteration: suneimi

- Phonetic: soon'-i-mee

- Definition:

1. to come together

- Origin: from G4862 and eimi (to go)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and εῖμι eimi (to go); to assemble: - gather together.
